content: wtransport crate (BiagioFesta/wtransport) is at v0.7.1 as of mid-2025, ~417k all-time downloads, actively maintained. Pure Rust, async-friendly (tokio), implements WebTransport over HTTP/3. Not yet at 1.0 but functional; pre-production label is due to spec draft status, not instability. The WebTransport spec itself achieved Baseline in March 2026 with Safari 26.4 support.
